reviews.comment:
Una paja para atender!
Lleno de gente y se ponen hablar de la vida!
Un desastre 35 min sin atender

(Translated by Google)
What a pain to get served!
Packed with people and they just start chatting about life! A disaster, 35 minutes without being attended to.

reviews.comment:
Si no sos conocido del playero y hay muchos autos...esperá bastante porq tienen prioridad los del lugar y o conocidos. Recorro todo el país y eso solo pasa aca. Incómodo e injusto.

(Translated by Google)
If you don't know the attendant and there are a lot of cars...wait a long time because locals and people they know get priority. I travel all over the country and this only happens here. Inconvenient and unfair.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6345909063456423645/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUROaXFfZXhnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Atiende muy lentamente y tienen una falta de respeto total por el cliente, segunda ves que voy a hechar combustible te hacen hacer la cola perder un montón de tiempo y no tienen combustible, no son capaces de cruzar las manguera o poner un cartel, y cuando le preguntas cuando van a tener te responden que ni idea, no se toman no siquiera el trabajo de saber cuándo van a tener.

(Translated by Google)
They serve very slowly and have a total lack of respect for the customer. This is the second time I've gone to get fuel, they make you wait in line, waste a lot of time, and then they don't have fuel. They can't even cross the hoses or put up a sign, and when you ask when they'll have more, they say they have no idea. They don't even bother to find out when they'll have more.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/6345909063456423645/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUMxclAyUnZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hace 44 años que visitó San Cayetano. El A.C.A siempre tiene la mejor atención y buen servicio. Chicos amables y educados , además mantienen la Estación impecable

(Translated by Google)
I've been visiting San Cayetano for 44 years. The A.C.A. always provides excellent service and attention. The staff are friendly and polite, and they keep the station spotless.
